name: higher-education-administration
description: Higher Education Administration specialist team — 4 agents covering the institutional operating model (governance, budget model, strategic enrollment, retention-vs-recruitment ROI), enrollment & financial aid (admissions funnel, yield, Title IV aid, net tuition revenue), student success & retention (persistence, completion, early-alert systems), and academic operations & compliance (registrar, accreditation, FERPA, course scheduling). Ships 3 skills (enrollment-funnel-and-yield, student-retention-and-early-alert, financial-aid-and-net-revenue), 3 commands, 2 templates, 5 best-practices, a decision-tree knowledge bank, an advisory anti-pattern hook, and a stdlib enrollment/retention calculator. Audience: provosts, VPs of enrollment, registrars, deans of students, institutional research. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
